channel.title: GitHub Makefile Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Makefile in GitHub

item.title: golang-standards/project-layout
item.description: Standard Go Project Layout

item.title: NVIDIA/nvidia-docker
item.description: Build and run Docker containers leveraging NVIDIA GPUs

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-specification
item.description: Specifications for OpenTelemetry

item.title: buildroot/buildroot
item.description: Buildroot, making embedded Linux easy. Note that this is not the official repository, but only a mirror. The official Git repository is at http://git.buildroot.net/buildroot/. Do not open issues or file pull requests here.

item.title: Sitoi/dailycheckin
item.description: 可基于【腾讯云函数】/【Docker】的每日签到脚本（支持多账号使用）签到列表: ｜爱奇艺｜全民K歌｜腾讯视频｜有道云笔记｜网易云音乐｜一加手机社区官方论坛｜百度贴吧｜Bilibili｜V2EX｜咔叽网单｜什么值得买｜AcFun｜天翼云盘｜WPS｜吾爱破解｜芒果TV｜联通营业厅｜Fa米家｜喜马拉雅极速版｜小米运动｜百度搜索资源平台｜每日天气预报｜每日一句｜哔咔漫画｜

item.title: foostan/crkbd
item.description: Corne keyboard, a split keyboard with 3x6 column staggered keys and 3 thumb keys.

item.title: SynoCommunity/spksrc
item.description: Cross compilation framework to create native packages for the Synology's NAS

item.title: ccrisan/motioneyeos
item.description: A Video Surveillance OS For Single-board Computers

item.title: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-proto-go
item.description: Generated code for OpenTelemetry protobuf data model

item.title: ailabstw/social-distancing
item.description: A simple, decentralized. privacy-reserving contact tracing system

item.title: WerWolv/Tesla-Menu
item.description: The Nintendo Switch overlay menu

item.title: nanoninja/docker-nginx-php-mysql
item.description: Docker running Nginx, PHP-FPM, MySQL & PHPMyAdmin

item.title: edgexfoundry/edgex-compose
item.description: EdgeX Foundry Docker Compose release compose files and tools for building EdgeX compose files

item.title: namely/giraffe-proto
item.description: Protofiles for Giraffe, Namely's gRPC to GraphQL adapter

item.title: ehn-dcc-development/ehn-dcc-schema
item.description: Schema for the ehn DCC payload

item.title: waveaccounting/terraform-aws-chatbot-slack-configuration
item.description: Module to enable Chatbot Slack channel configuration in Terraform

item.title: ucb-bar/chipyard-toolchain-prebuilt
item.description: Pre-built riscv-gnu-toolchain binaries. You should most likely only shallow clone this.

item.title: Clever/go-process-metrics
item.description: A library for tracking golang process metrics

item.title: openwrt/packages
item.description: Community maintained packages for OpenWrt. Documentation for submitting pull requests is in CONTRIBUTING.md

item.title: phhusson/vendor_hardware_overlay
item.description: This includes hardware-specific overlays for Treble ROM

item.title: LukeSmithxyz/based.cooking
item.description: A simple culinary website.

item.title: olxbr/kafka-manager
item.description: Dockerized kafka-manager
